lines.speaker: Osten
lines.text: Welcome, traveller. Are you looking to represent one of the houses of Great Kourend?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Tell me more.

lines.speaker: Osten
lines.text: As you are probably aware, Great Kourend is a vast kingdom. Many adventurers choose to wear special clothing which allows them to explore swiftly and with elegance.

lines.speaker: Osten
lines.text: As official tailor for Kourend, I can recolour this clothing, allowing adventurers to represent the city to which they are most loyal.

lines.speaker: Osten
lines.text: If you are interested, I would be more than happy to offer my tailoring services in exchange for Marks of Grace.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'd like to recolour my graceful clothing.

lines.speaker: Osten
lines.text: Fantastic, simply pass me the items of clothing you would like recoloured, and we can get started.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Not right now.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Actually, I just wanted to buy some clothes.

lines.speaker: Osten
lines.text: Oh, certainly. My assistant over there, Robyn, will be happy to help you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Not right now.

sections.title: Using uncoloured graceful outfit pieces on Osten

lines.speaker: Osten
lines.text: Are you sure you want to recolour that piece of graful clothing? It will cost 15 marks of grace.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That seems reasonable.

lines.speaker: Osten
lines.text: Which city would you like to represent?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: [Name of Zeah house].

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I want the colours you're wearing.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Actually, forget it.

lines.speaker: Osten
lines.text: Sorry, you don't appear to have enough Marks of Grace. I charge 15 for my services.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Not right now.

sections.title: Using already-coloured graceful outfit pieces on Osten

lines.speaker: Osten
lines.text: I can remove that item's colours free of charge. Alternatively I can recolour it to represent a city of Kourend for a fee of 15 Marks of Grace.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'd like to remove the colours.

lines.speaker: Osten
lines.text: Are you sure you want to revert that piece of clothing? You'll have to pay again if you want it recoloured.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes, I'm sure.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Not right now.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'd like to represent a different city.

lines.speaker: Osten
lines.text: Which city would you like to represent?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: [Name of Zeah house].

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I want the colours you're wearing.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Not right now.

lines.speaker: Osten
lines.text: Sorry, you don't appear to have enough Marks of Grace. I charge 15 for my services.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Not right now.
